evidence_rows.reading: The first v5 lane should be judged using the strongest q2/B symbol rather than widening to another lane.
A clean opening-led reading needs aligned permission and entry family, with anchors blocked mainly by hierarchy admission.
If the checked late window does not preserve the specialist position while anchors churn out, the lane should not be called persistence-led.

interpretation: The first v5 lane should only upgrade the carry reading if it contributes more than another clean opening case.
If the current 002273 evidence shows a specialist-only opening edge but no clean persistence edge, the lane should remain opening-led rather than being promoted into a carry breakthrough.
So the correct current posture is to treat the first v5 lane as opening-led until a later lane changes the carry-row-diversity reading.
